# Optivaize

## About
Optivaize is an AI agency based in De Bilt, Netherlands. We build AI agents, automation solutions, marketing systems, and custom software for businesses across the Netherlands.

## Location
Groenekanseweg 70, 3732 AG De Bilt, Netherlands

## Services
- AI Agents: Custom AI agents for email, presentations, content, and sales
- AI Marketing: SEO, content generation, social media automation
- AI Sales: LinkedIn outreach bots, lead generation, CRM automation
- Automation: Workflow automation, system integrations, process optimization
- Custom Software: Web applications, dashboards, APIs, and platforms
- AI Business Consulting: AI strategy, implementation roadmaps, team training
- AI Chatbots: Customer service bots, lead qualification, multilingual support
- AI Training: Workshops and courses for teams adopting AI tools

## Contact
- Email: info@optivaize.nl
- Phone: +31 6 42 69 89 18
- Website: https://optivaize.nl
